_descriptor_type: A type of descriptor. One of 'simulation', 'trace', and 'perf'.
_architecture: A name of the available architectures (PARAMS.<architecture>) found in scarab repository, which defines the machine parameters of the default configuration.
_experiment: Feeder-aware RRIP insertion-priority sweep on SPEC06. Mirrors dcache_repl_sweep_spec06 but restricts to the RRIP family (SRRIP/BRRIP/DRRIP), the only policies the branch_load_dep_repl_rrip mechanism hooks (cache_set_feeds_branch in libs/cache_lib.c overrides reference_val only for REPL_SRRIP/BRRIP/DRRIP). For each RRIP policy: a plain config (no feeder marking, per-policy baseline), a conservative feeder config (feeders installed at RRPV=1, one notch above the default long-interval insertion of 2), and a strong feeder config (feeders installed at RRPV=0, treated like a fresh hit -> longest residency). Feeders are marked via the attribution address set (branch_load_dep_repl_attribution), independent of the LRU reprieve scheme. Question answered: does giving branch-feeder lines better incoming RRIP priority reduce D$ feeder misses / branch-resolution stall cycles, and how much protection (RRPV 1 vs 0) is worth spending.
_workload_manager: manual: run each exp scenario with all the simpoints at a time, slurm: Slurm schedules simulations based on its policy
_root_dir: Root directory mounted into the docker container home, for instance, the user's home directory
_application_dir: The path to the benchmark application directory used for tracing or simulation.
_scarab_path: The path to the scarab repository that contains the scarab binary used to run the experiment.
_traces_dir: The local directory containing all simpointed traces
_top_simpoint: Run only top 3 simpoints stored in 'workloads_top_simp.json' instead of the entire simpoints in 'workloads_db.json'
_simulations: SPEC CPU2006 integer + floating-point rate suites. The integer thrashers (mcf, libquantum, xalancbmk, omnetpp) and fp movers (milc, soplex) are where any base-policy headroom will show.
_configurations: RRIP family only (--dcache_repl: 16=SRRIP, 17=BRRIP, 18=DRRIP). Feeder configs add --branch_load_dep_repl_rrip 1 (enable feeder RRIP insertion priority) and --branch_load_dep_repl_rrip_rrpv <v> (v=1 conservative, v=0 strongest; clamped to [0, RRIP_DISTANT_VAL-1]=[0,2]). Feeder marking is driven by the attribution address set: --branch_load_dep_repl_attribution 1 --branch_load_dep_addr_replay_coverage 1 --branch_load_dep_trace_dir /home/shanen/samsung/bld_traces_kmhv3. This is independent of the LRU reprieve scheme (branch_load_dep_repl / _repl_n), which is NOT set here. PREREQUISITE for every feeder config: per-simpoint <bench>_<simpt>_braddr.csv from a prior SPEC06 attribute-record pass, present in bld_traces_kmhv3; a workload lacking one marks no feeders and behaves as the plain RRIP config of the same policy.

baseline._params: Plain true-LRU (dcache_repl default 0). Cross-policy reference line.

srrip._params: Plain Static RRIP (dcache_repl 16), no feeder marking. Per-policy baseline for the srrip_feeder_* configs.

srrip_feeder_rrpv1._params: SRRIP + conservative feeder priority: attribution-marked feeders installed at RRPV=1 (one notch above the default long-interval insertion of 2).

srrip_feeder_rrpv0._params: SRRIP + strongest feeder priority: attribution-marked feeders installed at RRPV=0 (treated like a fresh hit -> longest residency).

brrip._params: Plain Bimodal RRIP (dcache_repl 17), no feeder marking. Per-policy baseline for the brrip_feeder_* configs.

brrip_feeder_rrpv1._params: BRRIP + conservative feeder priority: attribution-marked feeders installed at RRPV=1. Largest expected delta vs plain, since BRRIP inserts most lines at distant (RRPV=3).

brrip_feeder_rrpv0._params: BRRIP + strongest feeder priority: attribution-marked feeders installed at RRPV=0.

drrip._params: Plain Dynamic RRIP (dcache_repl 18), no feeder marking. Per-policy baseline for the drrip_feeder_* configs.

drrip_feeder_rrpv1._params: DRRIP + conservative feeder priority: attribution-marked feeders installed at RRPV=1. Note feeder overrides in leader sets slightly perturb the SRRIP/BRRIP PSEL dueling.

drrip_feeder_rrpv0._params: DRRIP + strongest feeder priority: attribution-marked feeders installed at RRPV=0.

_collect_stats: Stats collection settings for ./sci --collect-stats. configs: optional list of configuration names to collect (null or omitted = all configurations).
_mem: Memory scheduling and collection settings for Slurm jobs.
